# sakura_apprun_dedicated_cluster (Data Source)

Information about an AppRun dedicated cluster

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sakura_apprun_dedicated_cluster" "by_id" {
  id = "C62452FF-5F12-4058-8D3C-3F44488FF483"
}

data "sakura_apprun_dedicated_cluster" "by_name" {
  name = "ExampleCluster"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the cluster.
- `name` (String) The name of the cluster.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp of the cluster
- `has_lets_encrypt_email` (Boolean) If true the cluster must listen HTTP port 80 because LetsEncrypt challenges there
- `ports` (Attributes List) The list of ports that the cluster listens on (max 5) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ports))
- `service_principal_id` (String) The service principal ID.  This is the principal that invokes the application

<a id="nestedatt--ports"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ports`

Read-Only:

- `port` (Number) The port number where the cluster listens for requests
- `protocol` (String) Either `http`, `https`, or `tcp`
